summary: Implemented CLI disable command: resolves active project runtime, verifies module is Enabled (error if not found or already disabled), displays toggle diff showing capabilities/tiers/ack requirements that will be disabled, prompts for operator confirmation via readline, calls registry.disable(), rebuilds snapshot, displays new RS_hash. Follows enable.ts patterns exactly. Full workspace build passes.

verification.notes: CLI package has no test suite; verified via build compilation. Follows established enable.ts patterns.
